variants.title: Filtrec DVD256F05B/1 Pressure Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec DVD256F05B/1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the DVD256F05B/1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Outer Diameter: 54.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 24.2 mm, Length: 95.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 330 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 330 BAR, Seal: Nitrile
